<!-- Thanks for the contribution. Please fill this out before requesting review. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link the related issue if there is one. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Build / tooling

## Constraints check

- [ ] No new runtime dependencies were added.
- [ ] The permission set in `manifest.json` is unchanged, or the PR description justifies the additional permission.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally.
- [ ] A note was added to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.

## Manual testing

<!-- List what you exercised manually. The maintainer cares about this more than formal tests for this project. -->

- [ ] Short Colab notebook exports cleanly.
- [ ] Long Colab notebook exports without blank paper gaps.
- [ ] Notebook scroll position is restored after the run.
- [ ] Overlay and notebook chrome are restored after the run.
- [ ] One dark-theme notebook verified (if the change touches the capture or compositor paths).

## Screenshots

<!-- If UI-visible, drop before/after screenshots. -->
